fresh_facts.claim: US Central Command reported destroying 16 Iranian minelayers near the Strait of Hormuz on March 10, 2026.
F-22 jets were deployed to Israel's Ovda Airbase on February 24, 2026, as part of US military buildup.
The USS Gerald R. Ford carrier strike group was positioned off southern Israel by February 27, 2026, with four Norfolk-based destroyers (USS Bainbridge, USS Mahan, USS McFaul, USS Mitscher).
US military strikes on Iranian targets began on February 28, 2026, and escalated to large-scale air operations across 26 Iranian provinces by early March.
Joint US-Israeli strikes targeted approximately 200 Iranian air defense systems, ballistic missiles, IRGC bases, leadership facilities in Tehran, and nuclear sites.
Iran conducted missile and drone barrages against US and allied bases and Gulf states, hitting all GCC countries including energy infrastructure.
The IRGC ordered evacuation of Mariwan in the Kurdish area on March 3, 2026, amid strikes that caused jailbreaks.
The Islamic Resistance in Iraq claimed 67 attacks against US bases by March 3, 2026, with most being intercepted.
An Interim Leadership Council was formed on March 1, 2026, comprising President Pezeshkian, Mohseni-Eje'i, and Arafi.
Mojtaba Khamenei was elected to leadership on March 8, 2026, with the IRGC and leaders pledging allegiance.
President Pezeshkian shifted from conciliatory to hardline rhetoric on attacks as of March 8, 2026.
Saudi Arabia issued warnings of retaliation against Iran around March 8, 2026.
Pre-war 2025-2026 protests in Iran triggered crackdowns that killed thousands, prompting the US military buildup.
US military strikes hit IRGC and internal security sites as well as detention facilities during Operation Epic Fury starting February 28, 2026.
Virginia National Guard units were deployed to Kuwait as part of the US military buildup by early March 2026.
Six US military personnel were killed over a weekend in early March 2026 during operations in the Middle East.
An F-15 friendly fire incident occurred during US military operations in early March 2026.
Fourteen refueling tankers were positioned at Ben Gurion Airport by late February 2026 to support US air operations.
President Trump called Mojtaba Khamenei a 'lightweight' not expected to last without approval.
Iran's regime securitized itself through coercive measures rather than consent-based governance as of March 10, 2026.
fresh_facts.source: Institute for the Study of War (ISW) and analyst reports

fresh_facts.claim: Financial markets were betting on a quick end to the US-Israel-Iran war as of March 10, 2026.
Jailbreaks occurred in Iranian detention facilities during IRGC evacuations in Kurdish areas in early March 2026.

regime_fall.current_status: On day 12 of the US-Israeli campaign, Iran has sustained devastating military losses including destruction of air defense systems, ballistic missiles, IRGC bases, and nuclear sites across 26 provinces, with 16 minelayers destroyed near the Strait of Hormuz on March 10, while Mojtaba Khamenei consolidates hardline IRGC control despite severe internal instability marked by jailbreaks and coercive securitization.
regime_fall.last_major_event: US Central Command reported destroying 16 Iranian minelayers near the Strait of Hormuz on March 10, 2026, demonstrating sustained military pressure on Iranian naval and economic infrastructure.
